_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: IT infrastructure involves ensuring systems and processes are available, adaptable, reliable and secure.
reference_document_element_description: Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including compute environments, storage systems, networking, and security controls.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-015 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-A-003 (OP, cosine: 0.551), DA-S-007 (DA, cosine: 0.470).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.566). Shared vocabulary: [infrastructure, systems]. DDaT-only terms [adaptable, available, ensuring, involves, processes, reliable] vs WIDAI-only terms [compute, configure, controls, data, environments, maintain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.883, R=0.885). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DDaT element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (99.3%). The model interprets "IT infrastructure involves ensuring systems and processes are available, adaptab" as logically implying aspects of "Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including c" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Superset of' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.601 ≈ STS 0.566 (gap 0.034). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [infrastructure, systems] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [infrastructure, systems]. DDaT-only: [adaptable, available, ensuring, involves, processes, reliable]. WIDAI-only: [compute, configure, controls, data, environments, maintain].
